section000.name: Negative Numbers
section000.desc: This section introduces negative numbers, their origin and the many uses they have.

section001.name: Fractions
section001.desc: This section introduces fractions, how they were made, how they are better than division in most cases and how algebra uses them.

section002.name: Sets
section002.desc: This section introduces sets, how they work, how you can create your own and how they are fundamental in the axioms of math.
